series_metadata.series_title: Fireworks Manufacturer, Wholesaler, or Out-of-State Shipper Licensing Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the application, correspondence, annual renewals, facility construction documents, proof of liability insurance, ownership validation, variances, litigation and other support documents required for fireworks companies to be licensed in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless being used in litigation, convert records to machine readable format upon creation/receipt of file information/documents and retain paper copy for twenty years after associated license year ends. Upon confirmation that the machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness and passage of the specified time period, destroy paper copy. For files subject to litigation, maintain for the longer period of: twenty years after the end license year or five years after the end of the litigation associated with file. ; Microform: Maintain microfilm until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation that the machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy microfilm. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format permanently., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
